executor_steps: Delete the entire annex agree block from AOCSprocessing (lines 69-80) because it references subcomponent ports (TCP, ACF, OCF) that are not visible in the component type scope.

Move the signal flow requirements R1 and R2 into the implementation annex of AOCSprocessing.others as assert statements, since they describe connections between subcomponents and are only verifiable in the implementation context.

In AOCSprocessing.others, add an annex agree {** assert "Signal flow TCP to ACF via Cnx1": TCP.nominal_attitude = ACF.nominal_attitude; assert "Signal flow TCP to OCF via Cnx2": TCP.nominal_orbit = OCF.nominal_orbit; **};

Verify that all referenced ports (TCP.nominal_attitude, ACF.nominal_attitude, TCP.nominal_orbit, OCF.nominal_orbit) are declared in their respective subcomponent types and visible in the implementation scope.
